title: rubus terecaulis
intro: Rubus terecaulis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to help lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Rubus terecaulis include its potential to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease, diabetes, and certain types of cancer. Rubus terecaulis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
